_description: Provider classification for year extraction. Determines whether NJ year can proxy for global year, and how to interpret external source dates.
_source: Defined in extract_release_year.mjs PROVIDER_CLASS. Duplicated here for reference.

ONLINE_FIRST.description: No land-based history. NJ year IS the global online year. Confidence 4 for NJ proxy.

ONLINE_MAJOR.description: Primarily online companies, but may launch in UK/Malta before NJ. NJ year is approximate (±1yr). Confidence 3 for NJ proxy.

LAND_BASED_HIGH_RISK.description: Land-based cabinet origins. External source dates may reflect cabinet release, not online launch. High risk of wrong dates from SC/SL.

MIXED_ORIGIN.description: Some titles are land-based ports, some are online-original. Need per-game judgment.

MOSTLY_ONLINE.description: Primarily online but some legacy land-based titles. Generally trustworthy for online dates.

notes: Any provider not listed falls to UNKNOWN in the pipeline
AGS is LAND_BASED_HIGH_RISK but has provider GT — its years are from ags_provider_data, not external sources
Classification affects confidence scoring and post-processing rules in extract_release_year.mjs
